title: Add standalone tk board command (restore board/cloud entrypoint)
description:
Context: the web board (internal/tickboard/server, embedded UI) and cloud sync client (internal/tickboard/cloud) were only ever launchable via 'tk run --board' — and the runner was just deleted, so the board has NO CLI entrypoint. skills/ticks/references/tk-commands.md already documents the target interface: 'tk board [path]' with -p/--port (default 3000). Make that real.

Procedure:
1. Recover the old wiring from git history: 'git log --oneline --diff-filter=D -- cmd/tk/cmd/run.go' gives the deletion commit; 'git show <that-commit>^:cmd/tk/cmd/run.go' shows how the board server and cloud sync were constructed/started (--board/--cloud flow). Reuse that wiring minus everything runner-specific (no engine/budget/iterations).
2. Implement cmd/tk/cmd/board.go: 'tk board [path]' (path = repo dir, default cwd), --port/-p default 3000; starts the server, serves the embedded UI, file watching/SSE as the server package provides; preserve cloud sync startup if the old board path did it (conditional on config/auth as before).
3. REPO GOTCHA: register the command in BOTH cobra AND the legacy switch + usage text in cmd/tk/main.go.
4. The server has just been decoupled from runner internals (records watcher and run-stream endpoints removed by a prior tick) — build against the current server API; do NOT re-add run-stream/run-status anything.

Test cases:
- 'tk board --help' works via ExecuteArgs (command registered)
- server boots on an ephemeral port and serves GET /api/ticks (200, JSON) and GET / (embedded index.html) — start, probe, shut down in the test
- bad path arg -> clear error

Run: go test ./cmd/tk/... ./internal/tickboard/...

Files likely touched: cmd/tk/cmd/board.go (new), cmd/tk/main.go, command tests; possibly small exported-API touches in internal/tickboard/server if startup needs them.
notes:
2026-06-10 20:23 - Verified wiring from deleted run.go for cloud sync restoration: --cloud flag gated; cloud.LoadConfig(tickDir) reads token (~/.ticksrc; error message points to ticks.sh/settings); cloud.NewClient(cfg); boardServer.SetCloudClient(client) connects server events to cloud broadcasting; CloudInfo(cfg.BoardName) printed at startup. Currently NOTHING imports internal/tickboard/cloud — sync is unwired until this tick lands. Preserve flag-gated behavior: tk board --cloud.
2026-06-10 20:53 - WIRING CORRECTION (post-0u6): SetCloudClient no longer exists — it was the run-event push channel, deleted with the pipeline. Cloud tick sync is fully self-contained in internal/tickboard/cloud: wire it as cloud.LoadConfig(tickDir) -> cloud.NewClient(cfg) -> 'go cloudClient.Run(ctx)' -> cloudClient.Close() on shutdown (see deleted run.go lines 235-255, 422 in git history). Server needs no cloud hookup. Board startup surface preserved: server.New/Run/WithDevMode/TickDir.
acceptance_criteria: tk board [path] -p starts the local board serving embedded UI + /api endpoints with cloud sync preserved; registered in cobra and main.go switch; tests green
